verdict.rationale: The claim's EUR 33.483M is the Q1 2026 actual for Annualized subscription value, carried into the Q2 2026 sheet only as the 'Prior' comparative; the current authoritative Q2 2026 value is EUR 34.778M, so the claim agrees with a superseded prior-period figure rather than the Q2 2026 figure it purports to state.
verdict.suggested_action: Update the master document to the Q2 2026 ASV of EUR 34.778M and restate the 33.483M figure as the prior-period (Q1 2026) comparative.
